labels.notes: Dorothy 2:45 — complex case: post-hospital-discharge follow-up + chronic pain + opioid use disorder + depression + caregiver burden. SOAP captures it well. Diagnostic 311 (depression) correct. THREE BILLING ERRORS: (1) K005A listed twice as separate quantity-1 entries instead of ONE entry with quantity=2 — rule_engine deduplication bug when conditions array contains both PrimaryMentalHealth + OpioidWithdrawalManagement (both map to K005A). (2) G373A 'IM/SC/Intradermal — Sole Reason' is inappropriate — billing-LLM extracted injection_sole_reason from Sublocade/buprenorphine discussion in Plan, but Sublocade was PROPOSED/SCHEDULED for future, not administered today (transcript explicitly defers it 3 weeks). (3) Missing C002A 'Hospital In-Patient Visit / Discharge Follow-up' — Dorothy had two recent hospital visits and the visit is explicitly post-discharge follow-up; there's no rule mapping nor LLM extraction for this context. Failure modes: K005A-dedup-bug, billing-LLM-stance-blindness (proposed-as-performed for G373A), missing-C002A-mapping.
